## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for new behavior
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`make test`)
- [ ] Linter passes (`make lint`)
- [ ] If this adds a new API endpoint: OpenAPI docs are correct
- [ ] If this changes the semantic model format: `schema.json` is updated and validated
- [ ] If this adds a dependency: the dependency is justified in the PR description
- [ ] No hardcoded API keys, credentials, or secrets
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
